title: Route Cost Calculator
description: Industrial-grade route cost analysis tool based on ISO 14040, Lean logistics, and Six Sigma principles. Calculates total cost per route including fuel, labor, maintenance, tolls, and hidden loss drivers.

inputs.label: Route Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: Total one-way distance of the route. Used as primary driver for fuel, labor, and maintenance costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total one-way distance of the route. Used as primary driver for fuel, labor, and maintenance costs.

inputs.label: Fuel Consumption (L/100km)
inputs.businessContext: Average fuel consumption of the vehicle. Based on manufacturer data or telematics.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average fuel consumption of the vehicle. Based on manufacturer data or telematics.

inputs.label: Fuel Price (per liter)
inputs.businessContext: Current market price of diesel or gasoline. Updated weekly.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current market price of diesel or gasoline. Updated weekly.

inputs.label: Driver Wage (€/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Gross hourly wage including social charges. Based on collective labor agreements.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gross hourly wage including social charges. Based on collective labor agreements.

inputs.label: Average Speed (km/h)
inputs.businessContext: Expected average speed including traffic and stops. Used to calculate travel time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected average speed including traffic and stops. Used to calculate travel time.

inputs.label: Maintenance Cost (€/km)
inputs.businessContext: Average maintenance cost per kilometer including tires, oil, and repairs. Based on fleet data.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average maintenance cost per kilometer including tires, oil, and repairs. Based on fleet data.

inputs.label: Total Toll Cost (€)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of all tolls on the route. Can be obtained from route planning software.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of all tolls on the route. Can be obtained from route planning software.

inputs.label: Load Weight (tonnes)
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of cargo. Affects fuel consumption and wear.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weight of cargo. Affects fuel consumption and wear.

inputs.label: Route Type
inputs.businessContext: Characterizes the terrain and traffic conditions. Influences fuel consumption and speed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Characterizes the terrain and traffic conditions. Influences fuel consumption and speed.

inputs.label: Return Trip Included
inputs.businessContext: If true, distance and costs are doubled (round trip).

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, distance and costs are doubled (round trip).

rules.message: Distance must be greater than 0 km.
Load weight exceeds maximum legal limit (40 tonnes).
Round trip distance exceeds 5000 km limit.

thresholds.message: Fuel cost exceeds €200. Consider route optimization or fuel-efficient driving.
Labor cost exceeds €300. Evaluate driver scheduling or rest breaks.
Total route cost exceeds €1000. Perform detailed cost-benefit analysis.
Cost per km exceeds €2.0. Benchmark against industry average (€1.2–€1.8).
Fuel consumption is high relative to load. Check vehicle maintenance or driving behavior.

formulas.label: Travel Time (hours)
formulas.description: Calculates total travel time based on effective distance and average speed.

formulas.label: Fuel Cost
formulas.description: Calculates total fuel cost based on consumption, distance, and price.

formulas.label: Labor Cost
formulas.description: Calculates driver labor cost including a 15% fatigue factor (ISO 11228).

formulas.label: Maintenance Cost
formulas.description: Calculates maintenance cost based on effective distance.

formulas.label: Total Route Cost
formulas.description: Sum of all direct costs: fuel, labor, maintenance, and tolls.

formulas.label: Cost per Kilometer
formulas.description: Primary result: total cost per effective kilometer.

primary.label: Cost per Kilometer
primary.description: Primary KPI for route cost efficiency. Benchmark against WERC DC Metrics (€1.2–€1.8/km).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Empty Miles
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Percentage of distance driven without load. Increases cost per km.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Idle Time
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Time spent idling (traffic, loading/unloading). Increases labor cost without distance.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Fuel Waste
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Excess fuel consumption due to aggressive driving or poor maintenance.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Route Inefficiency
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Extra distance due to suboptimal routing (e.g., avoiding tolls).

suggestedActions.label: Optimize Route
suggestedActions.description: Use route planning software to reduce distance and avoid congestion.

suggestedActions.label: Eco-Driving Training
suggestedActions.description: Train drivers in fuel-efficient techniques (smooth acceleration, speed management).

suggestedActions.label: Consolidate Loads
suggestedActions.description: Increase load factor to reduce cost per tonne-km.

suggestedActions.label: Preventive Maintenance
suggestedActions.description: Regular maintenance to keep fuel consumption and repair costs low.

suggestedActions.label: Evaluate Toll Alternatives
suggestedActions.description: Compare toll vs. non-toll routes to find cost-optimal path.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Score
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Adjusted confidence based on input data completeness and variability. Uses Six Sigma DMAIC principles.
